modules.title: Introduction to Python
topics: History and philosophy of Python (Zen of Python)
Python 3.x vs Python 2 – why Python 3
Setting up the environment: Python interpreter, pip, VS Code, PyCharm
Python program structure: indentation as syntax
handsOn: Install Python 3 and configure VS Code
Explore the interactive interpreter (REPL)
modules.learningOutcome: Set up the Python environment and understand Python's philosophy, syntax structure, and execution modes.

modules.title: Data Types & Variables
topics: Built-in types: int, float, str, bool, NoneType
Dynamic typing and duck typing in Python
Variable assignment: simple, multiple, augmented (+=, -=)
Type conversion: int(), float(), str(), bool()
handsOn: String manipulation programs (reverse, title-case, word count)
Temperature and currency converter
modules.learningOutcome: Work with Python's dynamic type system, manipulate strings, and leverage built-in type methods.

modules.title: Control Flow
topics: Conditional expressions: if, elif, else
Ternary (conditional) expression: value_if_true if condition else value_if_false
Comparison operators (==, !=, <, >, is, in, not in)
Logical operators: and, or, not
handsOn: Number series and pattern-printing programs
Menu-driven programs using match-case
modules.learningOutcome: Implement clean and Pythonic decision-making and repetition using Python's control flow constructs.

modules.title: Functions
topics: Function definition with def and return
Positional and keyword arguments
Default parameter values
*args for variable positional arguments
handsOn: Flexible function programs using *args and **kwargs
Implement logging and timing decorators
modules.learningOutcome: Write powerful and flexible Python functions using advanced parameter features, decorators, and recursion.

modules.title: Data Structures: Lists, Tuples & Sets
topics: Creation, indexing, slicing, and mutation
Methods: append, insert, remove, pop, sort, reverse
List comprehensions and nested comprehensions
Immutability and use cases
handsOn: Data deduplication using sets
Matrix operations using nested lists
modules.learningOutcome: Select and use Python's built-in sequence and set types for efficient data management.

modules.title: Data Structures: Dictionaries & Collections
topics: Creation, access, update, and deletion
Key methods: keys(), values(), items(), get(), setdefault()
Dictionary comprehensions
Nested dictionaries
handsOn: Word frequency counter using Counter
JSON-like structured data processing with nested dicts
modules.learningOutcome: Use dictionaries and advanced collection types for complex, real-world data modeling.

modules.title: Object-Oriented Programming
topics: Class definition with class and object instantiation
__init__ method and instance attribute assignment
Class attributes vs instance attributes
Class methods (@classmethod) and static methods (@staticmethod)
handsOn: Build a Shape hierarchy with polymorphism and abstract methods
Implement a custom collection class with dunder methods
modules.learningOutcome: Design and implement object-oriented Python programs using classes, inheritance, and dunder methods.

modules.title: File I/O & Context Managers
topics: Opening files with open(): modes (r, w, a, rb, wb)
Reading: read(), readline(), readlines()
Writing and appending to files
with statement and context managers for safe resource handling
handsOn: CSV data processing: read, filter, and write report
JSON configuration file reader and writer
modules.learningOutcome: Read and write data in various file formats using Python's file I/O capabilities and context managers.

modules.title: Error Handling & Debugging
topics: Python exception hierarchy: BaseException → Exception → subclasses
try, except, else, finally blocks
Catching specific exceptions vs broad Exception catching
Raising exceptions: raise and raise from
handsOn: Robust file parser with comprehensive exception handling
Set up structured application logging with rotating file handler
modules.learningOutcome: Write resilient Python programs that handle exceptions gracefully and produce structured logs.

modules.title: Modules, Packages & Virtual Environments
topics: Importing modules: import, from, as, __all__
os, sys – operating system interaction
math, random – numeric utilities
datetime – date and time handling
handsOn: Create a custom Python package with sub-modules
Set up a virtual environment and manage project dependencies
modules.learningOutcome: Structure Python projects professionally using modules, packages, virtual environments, and pip.

modules.title: Iterators, Generators & Comprehensions
topics: Iterator protocol: __iter__() and __next__()
Generator functions using yield
Generator expressions (lazy evaluation)
List, dictionary, and set comprehensions
handsOn: Data processing pipeline using generator functions
modules.learningOutcome: Write memory-efficient Python code using iterators, generators, and comprehensions.

modules.title: Regular Expressions & Text Processing
topics: re module: match(), search(), findall(), finditer(), sub(), split()
Character classes: [a-z], [0-9], \d, \w, \s
Quantifiers: *, +, ?, {n}, {n,m}
Groups: (), (?:), named groups (?P<name>)
handsOn: Email and phone number validator using regex
Log file parser: extract timestamps, levels, and messages
modules.learningOutcome: Parse and process text data accurately using Python's regular expression engine.

modules.title: Mini Project: CLI Application
topics: Project planning: requirements gathering and data modeling
Applying: OOP design, file I/O, error handling, and collections
Command-line interface with argparse or input() menus
Writing clean, readable, and documented Python code (PEP 8)
handsOn: Build a Task Manager or Personal Expense Tracker CLI application
Implement add, list, update, delete, and file persistence features
modules.learningOutcome: Integrate all core Python concepts into a complete, functional, and well-documented CLI application.

modules.title: Advanced Python Internals
topics: Python data model and the object protocol
Metaclasses and class creation with type()
Descriptors: __get__, __set__, __delete__
Context managers with contextlib.contextmanager
handsOn: Build a validation framework using descriptors
modules.learningOutcome: Master Python's internals and advanced OOP features for framework and library development.

modules.title: Concurrency & Parallelism
topics: Python's Global Interpreter Lock (GIL): what it is and its implications
threading module: Thread, Lock, Event, Semaphore, RLock
multiprocessing module: Process, Pool, Queue, Pipe
asyncio: event loop, coroutines, async/await syntax
handsOn: Async web scraper using asyncio and aiohttp
modules.learningOutcome: Write concurrent and parallel Python programs using threads, processes, and async/await.

modules.title: Data Science Foundations
topics: NumPy: ndarray creation, indexing, slicing, vectorized operations, broadcasting
Pandas Series and DataFrame: creation and basic operations
Data loading: read_csv(), read_excel(), read_json()
Data cleaning: handling missing values, duplicates, data types
handsOn: Analyze a real-world dataset: load, clean, aggregate, and visualize
modules.learningOutcome: Use NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib for practical data analysis and visualization.

modules.title: Web Development Basics
topics: HTTP fundamentals and REST API concepts
requests library: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with headers and JSON
Routes and view functions
Jinja2 templates
handsOn: Build a Student CRUD REST API with FastAPI and SQLAlchemy
modules.learningOutcome: Build Python web APIs and services using Flask, FastAPI, and SQLAlchemy.

modules.title: Testing & Code Quality
topics: pytest: test discovery, fixtures, conftest.py, @pytest.mark.parametrize
unittest.mock for replacing dependencies in tests
Code coverage with pytest-cov
Type hints with the typing module (List, Dict, Optional, Union)
handsOn: Write a full test suite for the FastAPI application with fixtures and mocks
modules.learningOutcome: Ensure Python code quality through testing, type checking, and automated code formatting.

modules.title: Design Patterns in Python
topics: Pythonic implementations of classic design patterns
Singleton using __new__ or module-level instances
Factory function, Abstract Factory, Builder
Decorator pattern (leverages Python decorators naturally)
handsOn: Implement an event system using the Observer pattern
modules.learningOutcome: Apply Pythonic implementations of design patterns and SOLID principles to real-world projects.

modules.title: Packaging & Deployment
topics: Python package structure: src layout vs flat layout
pyproject.toml: project metadata, dependencies, build system
Building distributions: wheels and source distributions
Publishing to PyPI using twine and Poetry
handsOn: Package a Python library and containerize a FastAPI app with Docker
modules.learningOutcome: Package, publish, and containerize Python applications for production deployment.
